Khardung La.current_status: Check with BRO or local taxi drivers for latest
Khardung La.road_condition: Paved but narrow in sections. Hairpin turns.
Khardung La.tips: Don't stop at the top for more than 15-20 minutes due to altitude. Acclimatize in Leh for at least 24 hours before crossing. Start early (before 7 AM) to avoid afternoon clouds and traffic.

Chang La.current_status: Check with BRO or local taxi drivers for latest
Chang La.road_condition: Paved but rough in patches. Steep gradients.
Chang La.tips: Second highest motorable pass. Similar precautions as Khardung La. Army tea stall at the top is a popular stop. Carry water and snacks.

Manali to Leh Highway.elevation: Passes up to 5,328 m (Rohtang, Baralacha, Lachalung, Tanglang La)
Manali to Leh Highway.road_condition: Mix of paved and unpaved. Some stretches very rough.
Manali to Leh Highway.tips: 2-day journey recommended with overnight at Sarchu or Jispa. Altitude changes are dramatic. Carry extra fuel — few pumps between Manali and Leh. AMS risk is real on this route.

Srinagar to Leh Highway.road_condition: Better than Manali-Leh but Zoji La can be tricky
Srinagar to Leh Highway.tips: Scenic route through Kargil. More gradual altitude gain than Manali route — better for AMS acclimatization. Can do in 2 days with overnight in Kargil.

Spangmik to Merak (Pangong area).tips: Beautiful lakeside drive. Limited accommodation at Merak. Book homestays in advance during peak season.
